title: 「V1 + Gerund」句型
titleEn: Using a first verb followed by a gerund

source.file: Sentence Structure 58 -「V1 + Gerund：動詞後接動名詞句」.pdf

formula: Subject + V1 + gerund + object / other information

formulas.formula: Subject + V1 + gerund (verb-ing) + object / other information
Subject + modal verb + V1 + gerund + other information

example: The school may consider reducing the amount of schoolwork for students.
exampleZh: 學校可能會考慮減少學生的功課量。

examples.en: The school may consider reducing the amount of schoolwork for students.
examples.zh: 學校可能會考慮減少學生的功課量。

meaning.zh: 第一個動詞表達對某項活動的喜好、態度、建議、思考或控制；後面的 gerund 以 -ing 形式代表該活動。

rules.en: A gerund is a verb-ing form that represents an activity.
rules.zh: Gerund 是動詞 -ing 形式，在句中代表一項活動、行為或經歷。

rules.en: Only certain first verbs take a gerund naturally.
rules.zh: 並非所有動詞後面都可以直接接 gerund；常見 V1 包括 enjoy、consider、avoid、finish 和 suggest。

rules.en: Do not replace the gerund with to + verb after these target verbs.
rules.zh: 本課目標動詞後不可隨意改用 to＋動詞。

rules.en: V1 changes for tense and subject while the gerund remains in -ing form.
rules.zh: V1 會因時態和主語改變，gerund 仍保持 -ing 形式。

rules.en: Keep the object and other details inside the gerund phrase.
rules.zh: Gerund 後面可以保留受詞和其他資料。
examples: discussed reducing the use of paper in the office

rules.en: Suggest and recommend may be followed directly by a gerund.
rules.zh: Suggest 和 recommend 後面可直接接 gerund，不接 to-infinitive。

rules.en: Some verbs change meaning with a gerund or infinitive; those contrasts are outside this lesson.
rules.zh: 部分動詞接 gerund 或 infinitive 時意思會改變；這些對比不屬於本課重點。

benefits.en: It shows an exact attitude towards an activity.
benefits.zh: 第一個動詞能準確表達喜歡、避免、考慮、完成或繼續某項活動。
V1＋gerund 可把較長子句縮短，使意思更直接。

benefits.en: It helps you choose a more precise first verb.
benefits.zh: 不同 V1 能準確區分繼續、完成、避免、冒險和押後等意思。

benefits.en: It is useful for many everyday communication tasks.
benefits.zh: 它適合表達喜好、計劃、建議、完成事項、承認、否認和風險。

benefits.en: It makes speaking and writing less repetitive.
benefits.zh: Consider、suggest、avoid 等動詞能增加句式變化。

benefits.en: It prevents a common grammar error.
benefits.zh: 熟習本句型可避免 enjoy to read、avoid to use 等常見錯誤。

en: Rewrite each sentence using a suitable V1 + gerund structure.
Preserve the original meaning and use a suitable verb from the lesson bank.
The first word of each answer has been provided.
zh: 使用合適的 V1＋動名詞句型改寫以下句子。
保留原句意思，並使用本課動詞表中的合適動詞。
每題已提供答案的第一個字。

questions.prompt: Reading comic books after school gives Mia a lot of pleasure.
questions.promptZh: 放學後閱讀漫畫書令米婭感到很享受。
questions.answer: Mia enjoys reading comic books after school.
questions.answerZh: 米婭喜歡在放學後閱讀漫畫書。
questions.highlight: Mia enjoys reading comic books after school.

questions.prompt: Ben makes sure that he does not use his phone during family meals.
questions.promptZh: 本確保自己在一家人用餐時不使用電話。
questions.answer: Ben avoids using his phone during family meals.
questions.answerZh: 本避免在一家人用餐時使用電話。
questions.highlight: Ben avoids using his phone during family meals.

questions.prompt: Chloe completed the task of washing the dishes before the guests arrived.
questions.promptZh: 克洛伊在客人到達前完成了洗碗的工作。
questions.answer: Chloe finished washing the dishes before the guests arrived.
questions.answerZh: 克洛伊在客人到達前洗完了碗。
questions.highlight: Chloe finished washing the dishes before the guests arrived.

questions.prompt: Leo continued to ask the same question throughout the lesson.
questions.promptZh: 里奧在整堂課中不斷問同一個問題。

questions.answerZh: 里奧在整堂課中不停問同一個問題。
questions.highlight: Leo kept asking the same question throughout the lesson.

questions.prompt: We are thinking about whether to move the meeting to Friday.

questions.highlight: We are considering moving the meeting to Friday.

questions.prompt: Cooking simple meals for her family is something Nina really likes.

questions.highlight: Would you mind closing the door quietly?

questions.answerZh: 伊森每天晚上都跟表弟練習說英語。
questions.highlight: Ethan practises speaking English with his cousin every evening.

questions.prompt: Ava accepted that she had taken the last biscuit.

questions.answer: Ava admitted taking the last biscuit.

questions.prompt: The nurse says people should drink more water during hot weather.

questions.answer: The nurse recommends drinking more water during hot weather.

questions.prompt: Jason chooses not to travel during the busiest hours because he does not want to face the crowds.

questions.promptZh: 由於最後的安全測試尚未完成，機場決定把新登機手續區的開放時間推遲。
